title: Migration Status Response
description: Response schema for querying pending/applied migrations status. Used by CLI tools and deployment pipelines.

database.description: Database identifier/branch name (e.g., Neon branch name).

package.description: Which package's migration system is being queried.

version.description: Migration version identifier (timestamp or revision hash).

applied_at.description: Timestamp when migration was applied; null if pending.

pending_migrations.description: List of migrations that have not yet been applied to the database.

applied_migrations.description: List of migrations that have been successfully applied.

status.description: Overall migration status: 'up-to-date' if no pending migrations, 'pending' if migrations await application, 'error' if migration system is misconfigured.
